name: Shrimp Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and mix with 2 tablespoons of water. Set aside.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add green onions and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
4. Add the scrambled eggs and continue to cook, stirring until done.
5. Stir in the rice and cook until heated through, gently separating grains.
6. Add shrimp and lite soy sauce; cook, stirring, until heated through.
